violations.text: The walk-in gasket was observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2025

The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by marketing signage. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Staff removed during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/17/2024

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was under 200 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 200 ppm. PIC to contact service and/or refill dispenser. New Violation. Correct By: 06/17/2024
Gaskets located on the walk-in cooler was not in good repair. PIC Stated work order has been placed. New Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2024
The receptacles in the toilet rooms are lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2024
The refuse area had a small accumulation of leaf litter and vegetation overgrowth. Refuse areas to be maintained clean to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2024
